region_name: York and North Yorkshire Combined Authority
cluster_name: York and North Yorkshire Advanced Manufacturing
strap: York and North Yorkshire Advanced Manufacturing draws £156m of UKRI lead-led funding across 98 grants, anchored by Leeds (11%), with Centre For Process Innovation and Autotech Engineering R&D Uk on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" and "Coordinating instead of deciding" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
